title: Zcash: Zashi onboarding, and a look at its privacy boundaries | NoirCon 3 Devconnect 2025
description:
Learn how Zashi, the official wallet from the Electric Coin Company, implements shielded transactions, syncing, and privacy features without leaking metadata.
